name: SomeIpProvidedEventGroupAddConsumer
title: SomeIpProvidedEventGroupAddConsumer
syntax: long SomeIpProvidedEventGroupAddConsumer(dword pevgHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort);
description: Adds a consumer to a provided event group. Afterwards event/field notifications will be sent to this consumer.
